content: Serana: What’s a pretty little Breton like you doing in this cave, Elise? Shouldn’t you be wrapped around some drunken fool’s cock by now? Or is Parellius keeping you too busy to service the other patrons? Elise: Oh, Serana, you know Parellius is sweet, but he doesn't own me. I still take other clients when the septims are good. Hrokkar would whip my ass if I played favorites. Speaking of, I saw your group stroll in earlier. That man of yours, MJR—does he ever stop fucking? I swear I heard Lydia screaming from three tunnels over. Serana: MJR? Oh, darling, he’s like a Breton stallion—never runs out of stamina. And trust me, Lydia’s screams are just her realizing she’ll compete with centuries of vampiric bedroom expertise. That tight little Nord cunt of hers can’t compare to what can do with my throat. Elise: Mmm, sounds like you’ve got a proper rivalry going.
